name: Flutter Development
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'wget -qO- https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.19.0-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ -C /tmp && sudo mv /tmp/flutter /opt/flutter && echo export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:\$PATH >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:\$PATH && flutter doctor'
